context_policy.context_note: storyline context only; never a prediction input
context_policy.roof_operation_caveat: Retractable roof status is a matchday operations fact. Do not assume open or closed unless confirmed.

warnings: Venue facts are AI narration context only and must never be used as prediction inputs or probability modifiers.
Roof operation is unknown for retractable-roof venues until matchday operations confirm it.
Coordinates and altitude/elevation are static source-backed facts for AI narration/weather-keying only; they are never prediction inputs.

venues.is_pitch_enclosed_note: Roof operation dependent; do not assume closed or open before matchday confirmation.
venues.altitude_note: Elevation/altitude sourced from Open-Meteo elevation at the Wikidata coordinate.
venues.coordinate_note: Latitude/longitude sourced from Wikidata coordinate location (P625).
venues.weather_impact_level: Low if closed; medium if open
venues.static_context_note: Atlanta summer heat, humidity, and thunderstorms are mostly mitigated if the retractable roof is closed; if open, humidity and storm timing become relevant.

venue_context.static_context_note: Miami brings high heat, humidity, heavy rain, and lightning-delay risk; the seating canopy does not enclose the pitch.

table_proposal_dry_run.reason: Static JSON is the primary deliverable. A DB table can be added later after source-backed venue coordinates are filled; no table was created in this task.
table_proposal_dry_run.ddl_preview:
create table public.venue_facts (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  venue_key text not null unique,
  venue_name text not null,
  host_market text not null,
  host_city text,
  host_country text,
  fifa_net_capacity integer,
  roof text not null check (roof in ('open','retractable','fixed-canopy')),
  is_pitch_enclosed boolean,
  roof_operation text not null default 'unknown',
  altitude_m numeric,
  latitude numeric,
  longitude numeric,
  weather_impact_level text,
  static_context_note text,
  context_note text not null default 'storyline context only; never a prediction input',
  prediction_input_allowed boolean not null default false,
  source_urls jsonb not null default '[]'::jsonb,
  created_at timestamptz not null default now(),
  updated_at timestamptz not null default now()
);
alter table public.venue_facts enable row level security;
